router: Next.js App Router with src/app, next-intl locale routing, default Persian route group

current_integrations.name: Google Tag Manager
current_integrations.method: next/script inline GTM bootstrap afterInteractive plus noscript iframe in locale layout
current_integrations.recommendation: Keep exactly one GTM container loader in application if GTM is adopted; use GTM to manage vendor tags.

current_integrations.name: Google Analytics 4 direct gtag.js
current_integrations.method: next/script external gtag.js afterInteractive and inline config
current_integrations.recommendation: Move GA4 config and event tags to GTM, then remove direct gtag.js after verification.

current_integrations.name: Plausible Analytics
current_integrations.recommendation: If Plausible remains a required analytics vendor, load it from GTM or keep direct only if GTM is not adopted.

current_integrations.name: Microsoft Clarity
current_integrations.recommendation: Move Clarity loader to GTM and gate it on analytics consent.

current_integrations.name: Odoo CRM lead delivery
current_integrations.recommendation: Keep in application; this is business lead delivery and uses secrets.

existing_events.name: rfq_start
existing_events.current_vendor_dispatch: trackEvent to dataLayer, gtag, Plausible, Clarity if available

recommended_events.name: page_view
recommended_events.method: GTM history trigger or application dataLayer for canonical locale paths

recommended_events.name: generate_lead
recommended_events.method: GA4 event in GTM from rfq_submit or retained event

recommended_events.name: phone_click
recommended_events.method: GTM click trigger on tel: links or data attribute

recommended_events.name: whatsapp_click
recommended_events.method: GTM click trigger on wa.me URLs or data attribute

recommended_events.name: email_click
recommended_events.method: GTM click trigger on mailto: links or data attribute

recommended_events.name: cta_click
recommended_events.method: custom data attributes or application dataLayer for contextual CTA names

recommended_events.name: file_download
recommended_events.method: GTM download trigger once real href assets exist

migration_items.name: Direct GA4 gtag.js configuration
migration_items.current_method: Direct gtag.js script and config when NEXT_PUBLIC_GA4_ID is set
migration_items.recommendation: Create GA4 Google tag/config in GTM, map dataLayer events to GA4 event tags, then remove direct GA4 loader.
migration_items.risk: High duplicate page_view and event risk if GA4 remains direct while GTM also sends GA4.

migration_items.name: Microsoft Clarity loader
migration_items.current_method: Inline afterInteractive loader when NEXT_PUBLIC_CLARITY_ID is set
migration_items.recommendation: Use a GTM Clarity template/custom HTML tag gated by analytics consent.
migration_items.risk: Session recording/UX tool should not load before consent where consent is required.

migration_items.name: Plausible loader
migration_items.current_method: External script when NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN is set
migration_items.recommendation: If retained, load Plausible from GTM or choose GA4/Plausible as the primary analytics source to avoid duplicate measurement.
migration_items.risk: Analytics overlap with GA4 if both are active.

migration_items.name: Phone link click tracking
migration_items.current_method: React onClick sends phone_click through trackContactClick
migration_items.recommendation: Use GTM click trigger for tel: links or add data-analytics-event="phone_click" later for more context.
migration_items.risk: Low migration risk; medium attribution-context loss unless cta_location is preserved with data attributes.

migration_items.name: Email link click tracking
migration_items.current_method: Some email links tracked by React onClick, footer email links currently untracked
migration_items.recommendation: Use GTM click trigger on mailto: links and optional data attributes for cta_location.
migration_items.risk: Low; current implementation is inconsistent across email links.

migration_items.name: WhatsApp link click tracking
migration_items.current_method: React onClick on selected wa.me links
migration_items.recommendation: Use GTM click trigger for wa.me URLs plus data attributes for section/context.
migration_items.risk: Medium duplicate risk during migration if both React and GTM click triggers run.

migration_items.name: RFQ funnel application events
migration_items.current_method: Application state and API-response based trackEvent calls
migration_items.recommendation: Keep vendor-neutral dataLayer pushes in app; move GA4/Ads/Clarity/Plausible dispatch to GTM.
migration_items.risk: High if moved to DOM selectors; RFQ success depends on API response and dedupe ID.

migration_items.name: System page view event
migration_items.current_method: Client component mount sends system_page_view with ceiling_system
migration_items.recommendation: Keep structured dataLayer event or replace with server-provided page_category/page_system variables consumed by GTM.
migration_items.risk: React Strict Mode can duplicate mount-time events in development; verify production once.

migration_items.name: Contextual CTA click tracking
migration_items.current_method: Only selected CTA buttons call trackCtaClick; many Button links are untracked
migration_items.recommendation: Add stable data-cta-id/data-section attributes or lightweight dataLayer pushes for business CTAs; GTM handles vendor tags.
migration_items.risk: Generic DOM selectors cannot reliably distinguish hero/header/footer/system/project CTA context.

migration_items.name: Language change
migration_items.current_method: router.replace only; no analytics event currently
migration_items.recommendation: Add application dataLayer event with from_locale and to_locale; GTM maps to GA4.
migration_items.risk: DOM tracking can infer click but not reliably capture next locale/path across all localized routing behavior.

migration_items.name: GTM container loader
migration_items.current_method: Application injects GTM bootstrap and noscript from NEXT_PUBLIC_GTM_ID
migration_items.recommendation: Keep one GTM loader in the app if GTM is used; do not manage the GTM loader through GTM.
migration_items.risk: Hard failure if no loader exists; duplicate risk if multiple containers are added.

migration_items.name: Odoo CRM lead submission
migration_items.current_method: Server-side JSON-RPC using private env vars
migration_items.recommendation: Keep in application. GTM must not deliver leads or hold CRM secrets.
migration_items.risk: Moving this to GTM would break security, reliability, file handling, and CRM delivery.

migration_items.name: RFQ validation, spam controls, file upload limits
migration_items.recommendation: Keep in application; measurement can observe outcomes but not enforce business/security rules.
migration_items.risk: Security and data integrity risk if moved out of application.

migration_items.name: SEO JSON-LD scripts
migration_items.recommendation: Keep in application for crawler visibility and SEO correctness.
migration_items.risk: SEO risk if moved to GTM because crawler execution is not guaranteed.

migration_items.name: Direct multi-vendor dispatch from trackEvent
migration_items.current_method: Each event is sent to dataLayer, direct gtag, Plausible, and Clarity when globals exist
migration_items.recommendation: After GTM migration, remove direct vendor dispatch and keep a single vendor-neutral dataLayer push helper.
migration_items.risk: Duplicate events and inconsistent consent handling if direct dispatch remains.

migration_items.name: Duplicate GA4 potential: direct GA4 plus GA4 in GTM
migration_items.current_method: GTM and direct GA4 can both be enabled by env vars
migration_items.recommendation: Use either direct GA4 or GTM-managed GA4 during validation; final target should use GTM-managed GA4 only.
migration_items.risk: Duplicate page_view, generate_lead, and custom event counts.

migration_items.name: RFQ success event naming split
migration_items.current_method: Sends both rfq_submit_success and GA4-recommended generate_lead for the same successful lead
migration_items.recommendation: Use one canonical dataLayer event rfq_submit with event_id; let GTM send GA4 generate_lead and Ads conversions from it.
migration_items.risk: Conversion inflation if both are marked key events or both trigger ad conversions.

duplicate_risks: Direct GA4 gtag.js and GTM can be enabled simultaneously.
trackEvent dispatches to both dataLayer and direct vendor globals, so GTM vendor tags can duplicate direct vendor events.
RFQ success currently emits both rfq_submit_success and generate_lead for one lead.
React Strict Mode may duplicate mount-time TrackView events in development; production must still be validated.
privacy_risks: Analytics, GA4, Plausible, and Clarity load after interaction but before any cookie/analytics consent UI because no consent platform is present.
UTM values are stored in sessionStorage under aecs_utm.
RFQ data sent to analytics is mostly non-PII, but project_type, building_use, country, buyer_role, and project_stage can contain user-entered strings; enforce a no-PII dataLayer contract.
Odoo backup logging can include full lead details server-side; this is not a GTM issue but is sensitive operational logging.
performance_findings: Moving GA4/Plausible/Clarity loader code to GTM removes small app-side script loader code but does not eliminate third-party network cost.
GTM enables consent- and route-based delaying, which can reduce scripts loaded before a user consents or interacts.
GTM can make performance worse if all tags fire on all pages without consent or route conditions.
Current Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only allows script-src self and unsafe-inline only; an enforced CSP would need explicit GTM/Google/Plausible/Clarity origins.
prioritized_actions: Decide whether GTM will become the single vendor-tag manager; if yes, avoid enabling direct GA4 at the same time.
Implement consent defaults and update flow before activating advertising or session-recording tags.
Convert trackEvent to a vendor-neutral dataLayer-only helper in a later migration.
Use one canonical RFQ success event with event_id and let GTM fan out to GA4/Ads/Meta.
Add stable data attributes for CTA/contact/download tracking before replacing React onClick tracking.
